title: Info Tools
description: Modified Coordinates HUD to make your coordinates appear when  you have a compass in your inventory and the time of day appear when you have a clock in your inventory
body:
### Join our [discord](https://discord.com/invite/VFnHmXzNrm) to report bugs and make suggestions.

Russian Translation: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/rusinfo-tools](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rusinfo-tools)

## About
This simple datapack takes the [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net) coordinates HUD datapack and breaks it up to require having a clock and/or a compass in your inventory.

## How to use

### Config
Use `/trigger info_tools.config` to access the config menu

### Compass
A compass will show your current position and facing on your action bar, this makes it more convenient and easy-to-read for players who may not be as experienced in using the F3 menu.

### Clock
A clock will show the current time of day in a 24-hr format. The clock will also display 'Day' or 'Night' followed by a number. 'Day' indicates that it is currently day time and you cannot sleep, whereas 'Night' indicates that it is now nighttime and you can go to sleep. The number following the day/night indicator.

### Saddle
Riding on a horse-type mob (horse, zombie horse, skeleton horse, donkey, or mule) with a saddle will show you the mob's speed and jump statistics.
